File_Related_Requirements.Description: Local Employer name as customer on supplier invoice
File_Related_Requirements.Rule: Must show Global PPL CH GmbH as customer

File_Related_Requirements.Description: Local Employer address as customer on supplier invoice
Local Employer registration as customer on supplier invoice
Exception for flights/bookings where Local Employer name not possible
File_Related_Requirements.Rule: Worker's name acceptable when Local Employer name not possible
Local currency with FX rate calculation
Must be clearly stated on receipt
Must be actual tax receipts or invoices, not booking confirmations
Any personal information not required for reimbursement must be removed
Submit separate report per each business trip
Must use Travel Expense Report Template Switzerland CHF.xlsx
Map with relevant route (Google Maps sufficient)
Logbook required for each used car
Combined mileage total if using more than one vehicle per year

Compliance_Policies.Description: General business expenses for job completion
Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Usually tax exempt, grossed up if not tax free
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must provide sufficient proof like tax receipts or invoices
Receipt alone is not enough - you must provide sufficient proof (receipts, invoices) and ensure Local Employer name on invoice
Receipt is enough - no additional information needed
Receipt alone is not enough - you must get approval from your direct manager

Compliance_Policies.Description: Private vehicles, cars, vans, motorbikes, bicycles
Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Based on official Swiss mileage rates
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is not applicable - you must provide map with route (Google Maps sufficient), car details, destination, and logbook for each car used

Compliance_Policies.Description: Multiple vehicles used in one year
Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: All mileage calculated based on combined total
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is not applicable - you must track combined mileage total for all vehicles used

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Breakfast CHF 15, Lunch CHF 35, Dinner CHF 40
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - per diem covers meals, additional costs reimbursed against receipts

Compliance_Policies.Description: Alternative to per diem for domestic travel
Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Can reimburse meals against receipts instead of per diem
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must provide receipts for meals if not using per diem method

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Breakfast CHF 15, Lunch CHF 35, Dinner CHF 40
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - overnight expenses (hotels, transport) must be reimbursed against receipts

Compliance_Policies.Description: International travel with increased per diem
Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Portion exceeding set rate is taxable
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must provide receipts for any amount above the set per diem rate

Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Standard_Rule: Local Employer name must appear on invoices
Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Exception_Condition: Flight bookings where company name not possible
Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Accept worker's name on invoice WHEN company name cannot be used for flight bookings

Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Standard_Rule: Local Employer address must appear on invoices
Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Exception_Condition: Flight bookings where company address not applicable
Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Accept worker's personal address on invoice WHEN worker books personal flight (logical extension of name exception)

Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Standard_Rule: Local Employer registration number must appear on invoices
Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Exception_Condition: Flight bookings where company registration not applicable
Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Accept absence of company registration number (CHE-295.369.918) WHEN worker makes personal flight bookings (logical extension of name exception)

Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Standard_Rule: Must choose either per diem OR actual expenses
Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Expense_Type: Per Diem - Meals vs Meal Receipt - Actual
Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Allow employer to choose between per diem method OR actual meal receipts (not restricted to one method)

Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Standard_Rule: All business expenses require supporting receipts
Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Exception_Condition: Small business expenses during business trips
Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Allow reimbursement without detailed documentation up to CHF 20 maximum for small business trip expenses
OVERRIDE: Do not require receipts BUT require logbook for each used car, map with route, car details, and destination
OVERRIDE: Require direct manager approval for ALL training expenses regardless of job relevance

Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Standard_Rule: Per diems at set rates are tax-free
Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Exception_Condition: International travel with increased per diem
Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Allow increased per diem rates BUT tax the excess amount above set rates AND require receipts for taxable portion
OVERRIDE: Require receipts reported in local currency WITH FX rate calculation provided by worker

Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Standard_Rule: Calculate mileage per individual vehicle used in one year
Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Exception_Condition: Multiple vehicles used in one year
Switzerland_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_E.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Calculate all mileage based on combined total WHEN worker uses more than one vehicle per year
